emptyState.title: AI-ready billing pattern
emptyState.description: Review the demo inbox, create tasks, or draft invoices from natural language.

suggestedPrompts.reviewInboxPrompt: Review the demo inbox and suggest tasks for today based on emails that need action.
suggestedPrompts.draftInvoicePrompt: Draft an invoice for Acme Corp for 10 hours of consulting at $150/hour, due in 30 days.

chat.placeholder: Ask me to review the demo inbox, create a task, or draft an invoice...

upgrade.notAvailableDescription: The AI assistant is available on Pro and Team plans. Upgrade to unlock the AI-ready monetization module with real task actions, demo inbox review, and invoice drafts.
upgrade.limitExceededDescription: You've used all {limit} AI requests this month. Upgrade your plan for a higher limit, or wait until next month.
